title: wolfhsm: inconsistent API shape — sha256 free function vs Client methods
description: SHA-256 is exposed as a free function sha::sha256(&mut client, data) while NVM, counter, and key-cache operations are all methods on Client (client.nvm_write(...), client.key_cache(...), etc.). Pick one convention. Either make all one-shot crypto operations free functions in their respective modules, or make them all methods on Client. The current split is arbitrary and surprising.
